title: 3DBricks REMASTERED
body:
## ⭐ Turn your Minecraft world into a Lego-Inspired experience with custom 3D blocks and items!

![3DBRICKS REMASTERED Preview Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c59cd3dcd0b9f2d2111cf302b4ad936db2bd768.jpeg)

💡 Enable shaders to enjoy the handmade specular maps and realistic lighting, or keep it vanilla if you want the classic experience!

- Custom 3D blocks/items with multiple variations for each block.
- 1024x1024 Normal & Specular textures, allowing realistic lighting with shaderpacks.
- Custom blockstates for blocks such as stairs/torches/slabs/etc...
- Supports vanilla-lighting for those with low-mid performance PCs.

This resource pack includes **over 50 custom blocks** and items, and **over 213 blockstates** for variations!

![Halloween Special Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb0fb5b8db58550a3480e41d67c9a54077103b08.jpeg)

🎁 You can download the demo version of this pack for _FREE_ (Check versions) The full version is also available for **only** $1, on my Patreon! _It helps me make more cool stuff like this :)_

Patreon: [https://www.patreon.com/parsafarvadian](https://www.patreon.com/parsafarvadian)
